name: AOHell
text: URGENT: Please verify your AOL account. Send your username, password, and credit card number to customer service within 24 hours to avoid suspension. America Online billing department.

name: Nordea Bank
text: Dear Nordea customer, we detected suspicious activity. Please download our new anti-spam security tool to protect your account. Install the attached update immediately or your account will be frozen.

name: Operation Phish Phry
text: Your bank account has been temporarily locked. Click the link to verify your identity and unlock access. Your social security number, username, and password are required.

name: RSA Spear Phish
text: 2011 Recruitment Plan attached. Please review the candidate shortlist. The Excel file contains HR-confidential compensation data. Open immediately and respond with approvals.

name: Dyre Malware
text: Urgent tax consultation required. Your company may be audited. Download the attached document to review your tax obligations. Failure to respond will result in penalties.

name: Sony Apple ID Phish
text: Your Apple ID has been used to sign in from a new device. Verify your identity now. Click here and enter your Apple ID password to secure your account. Urgent verification required.

name: Facebook+Google Quanta BEC
text: Please process the attached invoice for the Quanta Computer hardware order. Wire transfer required urgently to our updated bank account. SWIFT details below. The CFO is asking about this payment — please expedite.

name: World Cup 2018 Scam
text: Congratulations! You won the FIFA World Cup lottery. To claim your prize ticket and apartment rental in Moscow, please send your passport number, credit card details, and a processing fee.
